title: Sky Lands PBR
description: Sky Lands with bump mapping and specular ☁️
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/czw3FSRO9JI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Enjoy PBR textures for [Sky Lands](https://modrinth.com/mod/sky-lands) !

I used [Bliss](https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader) shader in the pictures

For the best looking of emissive blocks don't forget to activate floodfill and colored candles in Shader settings>Ambient Light>FloodFill>Colored Candles: ON

I am using Neapik RTX resource pack to add the PBR effect on vanilla blocks
